title: Mission Vao — Young Twi'lek Companion
chunkText: Mission Vao is a young Twi'lek street kid companion found on Taris in KOTOR 1. Approximately 14-16 years old, she grew up on the streets with her Wookiee best friend Zaalbar. Mission is skilled as a scoundrel and thief, expert at slicing computer systems and picking locks. She and Zaalbar are a package deal — recruiting one recruits both. Her brother Griff abandoned her on Taris and appears as a minor side character across the game.
